description: You are preparing a feature article titled 'The Disappearing Rings' and need to capture a sequence of simulated telescopic images showing Saturn's rings transitioning to an edge-on plane crossing. From the Atacama Large Millimeter Array (ALMA) in Chile (23.02° S, 67.75° W, 5058m), capture high-power telescopic screenshots of Saturn at 06:00 UTC on October 15, 2017; October 15, 2021; and March 23, 2025. The images should show the planet and rings clearly without atmosphere or landscape interference. Save the screenshots to /home/ga/Pictures/stellarium/ and create an article outline at /home/ga/Desktop/saturn_rings_article.txt. The text file must include the title 'The Disappearing Rings', the target planet 'Saturn', the observation years (2017, 2021, 2025), and a note explaining the 'edge-on' appearance of the rings.
